module.name: ibm-roks-cluster
module.description: Provision or attach IBM ROKS cluster infrastructure for BIG-IP Next deployment.

required.name: ibmcloud_api_key
required.description: IBM Cloud API key used to provision or query cluster resources.

required.name: ibmcloud_cluster_region
required.description: IBM Cloud region for cluster resources.

required.name: ibmcloud_resource_group
required.description: IBM Cloud resource group for created resources.

optional.name: create_cluster
optional.description: Create a new OpenShift cluster instead of attaching to an existing one.

optional.name: create_transit_gateway
optional.description: Create a transit gateway for cross-VPC connectivity.

optional.name: create_cos_instance
optional.description: Create IBM Cloud Object Storage for the OpenShift registry.

optional.name: create_client_vpc
optional.description: Create a client VPC for test and management access.

optional.name: create_jumphost
optional.description: Create a jumphost instance in the client VPC.

optional.name: min_worker_vcpu_count
optional.description: Minimum worker vCPU count for flavor selection.

optional.name: min_worker_memory_gb
optional.description: Minimum worker memory in GB for flavor selection.

optional.name: cos_instance_name
optional.description: IBM COS instance name for registry storage.

optional.name: client_jumphost_name
optional.description: Name of the client jumphost instance.

optional.name: ssh_key_name
optional.description: IBM Cloud SSH key name for jumphost access.

key_outputs.name: cluster_id
key_outputs.description: Cluster ID alias used by downstream modules.

key_outputs.name: cluster_name
key_outputs.description: Cluster name alias used by downstream modules.

key_outputs.name: openshift_cluster_crn
key_outputs.description: OpenShift cluster CRN for IAM integration.

key_outputs.name: cluster_vpc_id
key_outputs.description: Cluster VPC ID for downstream cloud configuration.

key_outputs.name: cluster_vpc_name
key_outputs.description: Cluster VPC name for downstream cloud configuration.

key_outputs.name: kubeconfig_file_path
key_outputs.description: Path to the kubeconfig file produced by the cluster module.

required.name: ibmcloud_api_key
required.description: IBM Cloud project or credential-template secret providing the API key.
